---
title: "**40 Books Donation List**"
#subtitle: "Bridge Course Level 1"
image: book-donation.png
#author: "SARA Institute of Data Science, Sonipat"
#date: "July 3, 2026" 
date-modified: last-modified
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    toc-title: "Contents"
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
    css: styles.css
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import pandas as pd
from itables import show
import itables.options as opt

# Global itables options
opt.dom = 'Qlfrtip'
opt.classes = "display compact"
opt.maxBytes = 0
```

## About This List

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
### 📚 How to Donate a Book to SARA

SARA Institute of Data Science is building a **Bridge Course: Level 1** for first-generation learners and students from marginalised communities. You can support us by donating a book from this list in two ways:

- **Send your old copy** - Post your pre-loved book directly to us at the address below
- **Buy & ship new** - Purchase a new copy online and have it delivered to SARA

**📬 Delivery address:**
SARA Institute,
Dr. Ambedkar Bhawan,
Kakroi Road, Sonipat
Haryana - 131001,
Mobile No. +91 925 315 2024

**✉️ Notify us after sending:** [sara.institute.info@gmail.com](mailto:sara.institute.info@gmail.com)

*Please email us with your name and the book title so we can acknowledge your donation and update this list.*
:::

---

![](book-donation.png){width="70%"}

## Book Donation Tracker

Use the **search box** to find a specific book, or **filter by subject or status** using the column filters below.

::: {.callout-tip icon=false}
### 🟢 Status Guide
- 🟢 **Received** - We have this book. Thank you to our donors!
- 🟡 **In Transit** - A donor has sent this and it is on its way
- 🔴 **Needed** - This book still needs a donor
:::

```{python}
#| label: book-data

books = [
    # GEOGRAPHY
    ("Geography", "Guns, Germs, and Steel", "Jared Diamond", "Needed", ""),
    (
        "Geography",
        "Geography: Realms, Regions, and Concepts",
        "H.J. de Blij & Peter Muller",
        "Needed",
        "",
    ),
    ("Geography", "Introducing Physical Geography", "Alan H. Strahler", "Needed", ""),
    ("Geography", "How to Lie with Maps", "Mark Monmonier", "Needed", ""),
    ("Geography", "The Power of Geography", "Tim Marshall", "Needed", ""),
    # SOCIAL SCIENCE
    ("Social Science", "Sociology", "Anthony Giddens", "Needed", ""),
    (
        "Social Science",
        "Introduction to Sociology (OpenStax)",
        "Heather Griffiths et al.",
        "Needed",
        "",
    ),
    ("Social Science", "The Sociological Imagination", "C. Wright Mills", "Needed", ""),
    (
        "Social Science",
        "Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind",
        "Yuval Noah Harari",
        "Needed",
        "",
    ),
    (
        "Social Science",
        "Outliers: The Story of Success",
        "Malcolm Gladwell",
        "Needed",
        "",
    ),
    # SCIENCE
    ("Science", "A Short History of Nearly Everything", "Bill Bryson", "Needed", ""),
    ("Science", "The Magic of Reality", "Richard Dawkins", "Needed", ""),
    ("Science", "What If?", "Randall Munroe", "Needed", ""),
    (
        "Science",
        "The Gene: An Intimate History",
        "Siddhartha Mukherjee",
        "Needed",
        "",
    ),
    ("Science", "Cosmos", "Carl Sagan", "Needed", ""),
    # HISTORY
    (
        "History",
        "Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind",
        "Yuval Noah Harari",
        "Needed",
        "See Social Science copy",
    ),
    ("History", "A Little History of the World", "E.H. Gombrich", "Needed", ""),
    ("History", "The History Book (DK)", "DK Publishing", "Needed", ""),
    ("History", "India After Gandhi", "Ramachandra Guha", "Needed", ""),
    ("History", "The History of the Ancient World", "Susan Wise Bauer", "Needed", ""),
    # ENVIRONMENTAL SCIENCE
    (
        "Environmental Science",
        "Environmental Science: Toward a Sustainable Future",
        "Richard T. Wright & Dorothy Boorse",
        "Needed",
        "",
    ),
    ("Environmental Science", "Silent Spring", "Rachel Carson", "Needed", ""),
    ("Environmental Science", "A Sand County Almanac", "Aldo Leopold", "Needed", ""),
    (
        "Environmental Science",
        "Textbook of Environmental Studies",
        "Erach Bharucha",
        "Needed",
        "",
    ),
    (
        "Environmental Science",
        "How to Avoid a Climate Disaster",
        "Bill Gates",
        "Needed",
        "",
    ),
    # MATHEMATICS
    ("Mathematics", "Basic Mathematics", "Serge Lang", "Needed", ""),
    (
        "Mathematics",
        "The Art of Problem Solving Vol. 1",
        "Richard Rusczyk & Sandor Lehoczky",
        "Needed",
        "",
    ),
    ("Mathematics", "How to Solve It", "George Polya", "Needed", ""),
    (
        "Mathematics",
        "Mathematics: From the Birth of Numbers",
        "Jan Gullberg",
        "Needed",
        "",
    ),
    ("Mathematics", "Introductory Statistics", "Neil Weiss", "Needed", ""),
    # GENERAL KNOWLEDGE
    (
        "General Knowledge",
        "Lucent's General Knowledge",
        "Lucent Publications",
        "Needed",
        "",
    ),
    (
        "General Knowledge",
        "Manorama Yearbook",
        "Malayala Manorama",
        "Needed",
        "Latest edition preferred",
    ),
    (
        "General Knowledge",
        "Very Short Introductions (set of 5)",
        "Oxford University Press",
        "Needed",
        "Any 5 titles welcome",
    ),
    (
        "General Knowledge",
        "The Book of General Ignorance",
        "John Lloyd & John Mitchinson",
        "Needed",
        "",
    ),
    (
        "General Knowledge",
        "An Incomplete Education",
        "Judy Jones & William Wilson",
        "Needed",
        "",
    ),
    # CIVICS & POLITY
    (
        "Civics & Polity",
        "Indian Polity",
        "M. Laxmikanth",
        "Needed",
        "",
    ),
    (
        "Civics & Polity",
        "Introduction to the Constitution of India",
        "D.D. Basu",
        "Needed",
        "",
    ),
    (
        "Civics & Polity",
        "Why Nations Fail",
        "Daron Acemoglu & James Robinson",
        "Needed",
        "",
    ),
    ("Civics & Polity", "Development as Freedom", "Amartya Sen", "Needed", ""),
    ("Civics & Polity", "Politics in India", "Rajni Kothari", "Needed", ""),
]

df = pd.DataFrame(books, columns=["Subject", "Title", "Author", "Status", "Notes"])


# Add emoji to Status for visual clarity
def status_badge(s):
    mapping = {
        "Received": "🟢 Received",
        "In Transit": "🟡 In Transit",
        "Needed": "🔴 Needed",
    }
    return mapping.get(s, s)


df["Status"] = df["Status"].apply(status_badge)
df.index = range(1, len(df) + 1)
```

```{python}
#| label: summary-stats

total      = len(df)
received   = df["Status"].str.startswith("🟢").sum()
in_transit = df["Status"].str.startswith("🟡").sum()
needed     = df["Status"].str.startswith("🔴").sum()
pct        = round((received / total) * 100)
```

### Library Progress

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-3}
::: {.callout-note icon=false}
**📦 Total Books**

# `{python} total`
on the wishlist
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-3}
::: {.callout-tip icon=false}
**🟢 Received**

# `{python} int(received)`
already on the shelf
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-3}
::: {.callout-warning icon=false}
**🟡 In Transit**

# `{python} int(in_transit)`
on the way to us
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-3}
::: {.callout-important icon=false}
**🔴 Still Needed**

# `{python} int(needed)`
waiting for a donor
:::
:::

:::

**`{python} pct`% of our library goal reached.** Every book brings us closer.

---

### Full Book List

```{python}
#| label: interactive-table

show(
    df,
    columnDefs=[
        {"width": "14%",  "targets": 0},   # Subject
        {"width": "30%",  "targets": 1},   # Title
        {"width": "20%",  "targets": 2},   # Author
        {"width": "14%",  "targets": 3},   # Status
        {"width": "22%",  "targets": 4},   # Notes
    ],
    layout={
        "topStart":  "search",
        "topEnd":    "pageLength",
        "bottomStart":"info",
        "bottomEnd": "paging",
    },
    lengthMenu=[10, 20, 40],
    pageLength=20,
    style="width:100%",
    caption="SARA Foundation Library — Book Donation Wishlist",
    classes="display compact stripe hover",
)
```

---

## By Subject

```{python}
#| label: subject-summary

summary = (
    df.groupby("Subject")["Status"]
    .value_counts()
    .unstack(fill_value=0)
    .reset_index()
)

# Ensure all columns exist
for col in ["🟢 Received", "🟡 In Transit", "🔴 Needed"]:
    if col not in summary.columns:
        summary[col] = 0

summary["Total"] = summary[["🟢 Received", "🟡 In Transit", "🔴 Needed"]].sum(axis=1)
summary = summary[["Subject", "🟢 Received", "🟡 In Transit", "🔴 Needed", "Total"]]
summary = summary.sort_values("Subject").reset_index(drop=True)
summary.index = range(1, len(summary) + 1)

show(
    summary,
    paging=False,
    searching=False,
    info=False,
    style="width:60%",
    classes="display compact stripe",
    caption="Donation status by subject",
)
```

---

## How to Notify Us

After sending a book, please email us at **[sara.institute.info@gmail.com](mailto:sara.institute.info@gmail.com)** with:

1. Your **name** (for acknowledgement)
2. The **book title** you are donating
3. Whether you sent an **old copy** or purchased a **new one**
4. Your **city / country** (so we can thank our community publicly if you wish)

We update this list regularly. Thank you for supporting free, dignified education. 

---

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
*This list is maintained by SARA Institute of Data Science, Sonipat. Last updated: `{python} pd.Timestamp.today().strftime('%d %B %Y')`*
:::
